gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, opens both arms wide with excitement, and smiles while introducing the topic of addition
a person leans slightly forward, tilting the head and encouragingly points toward the class while asking a question
a tutor stands with hands on hips, nods confidently, and gestures toward an imaginary number line as they explain
a person bends at the knees, mimicking a jumping motion as they visualize moving forward on a number line
a tutor crouches down and gathers imaginary counters with both hands, showing enthusiasm for the counting activity
a person lifts hands up, counting along and gesturing outward as they guide the addition of more counters
a tutor raises both arms in celebration, smiling broadly and nodding to emphasize the success of learning addition
a person gestures with one hand to symbolize grouping, while the other hand moves in a circular motion to illustrate addition
